titleStmt.title: SII 7.333: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 333. (A.R. No. 142 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP CLOSE TO SIVARAMA-KARANIKA'S HOUSE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē nama[ḥ .*] Avighnamastu . namastuṁgaśiraccuṁbi caṁdra
cāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayā
bhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1470 saṁda vartamāna kīlaka saṁvatsarada kārttika śu 15 ĀdivāraThere was a lunar eclipse in the month of inscription has clearly Ādivāra.sōmōparā
gapu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu mūrukēriya śrīsōmanāthadēvara saṁnidhiyallu dēvaraṁgeya mūḍaṇa mane
rada baḷiya Ajilaseṭiyaru kaṭṭisida maṭhadali barasida dharmmaśāsanada vivara pūrvadali Ajilaseṭiyaru
māḍida dhar(ṁ)ma ja 6 Avara moṁmaga narenāgeya Ayyaseṭṭiyara maga timayaseṭṭiyaru māḍida dhar
ṁmma ja 6 Atana tāyi nāgamaseṭṭiti māḍida ja 1 A ṁtuja 13 kke Ajilaseṭṭiyaru māḍida ja 6 ke maṭhada sta
ḷa vivara hosavaḷadali mūṟukēriya halara kayya koṁḍa mūla muddhana gaddeya catusīmi mūḍa
mūḷeya maruseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu kartana baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu vōṇiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu Akkariga mallapana gaḍiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī nālku gaḍiyoḷage bittu mu 1 yī bāḷige teṟu
kāṭi haṇa tettuvadakke naḍasuva Akki nāghaṁḍugadallu mu 16 mataṁ mūṟukēriya mūvara kayya
yoḷage koṁḍa mūlada dēmaṇanāykara beṭa seṭikāṟa rudraseṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu mūṟukēriyava
ra gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu seṭṭikāṟa rudraseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu hariva baccaliṁdaṁ teṁkalu [I]nālku gaḍi
yoḷage makki mū 1Ø melagade bittu mu 6 kaṁbaḷagade catusīme hariva baccaliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu mūrukēriya halara gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ baḍagalu kartana gaḍi maḍigadeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu hariva bacaliṁdaṁ teṁkalu I nālku gaḍiyoḷage bittu mu 3 . mattaṁ
bittuva gade mu 5 . Aṁtu bitu mu 15 mane maneṭhāU naḍu maṭhake naḍava gēṇi mu 16 mattaṁ mūṟukēriya halara
kayya koṁḍa mūla kōṭataṭṭinalu Aṁṇappa tuṁga bittuva bāḷu naḍava hā
diyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu ṭhāvina gaḍi Aṁṇahēraḷa gaḍi ḷḷa kaṁdana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu yī nālku gaḍiyalu vi
vara (.) kke yī bāḷige teṟu mū 40 ke ga hattu 10 . nuḷidu teṟuva teṟu tettu yī bāḷina mane ṭhāvina gaḍi Aṁṇapa
tuṁgana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu bāvana tuṁgana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu tuṁgana gaḍiyiṁ mū
ḍalu kartana gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yī nālku gaḍi maneyaḍiya hāḷiyiṁ Akki mu 2
mattaṁ bāḷakuduravoḷage bīmibhaṭṭana maga sōmabhaṭana hoduḷa kumuseṭiya kaṭṭugaḍi yaḍi tana ko
ṁḍa bāhiriya nārasihadēvara yī mūvara gaḍiṁ paḍuvalu karttaradharmmōpādhyara yibara gaḍiyiṁ ba
ḍagalu saṁkarabāhiriya nārasiṁhadēvara gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu jāgatinabhaṭṭara gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yi
nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bitu mu 2 gaddege biḍāruvāravāda varaha ga 55 yage biṭṭa bāḷige
hā 12 maṭhake pradhānāyavāgi naḍasuva Akki mu 1 hattu teṟu kaṁpaḷiyalu kaṁna
maseṭiya kaṭṭu vaḷiya bayala gaḍi hebāra śaṁkharagaḍiyiṁda
ḍiṁdaṁ baḍagalu nārāyaṇaseṭiya gaḍiya kōṭiṁ mūḍalu perbācara gaḍi janārddana hōḷara gaḍiyiṁ
teṁkalu keṟe saha yi nālku gaḍiyoḷage bittu mu 4 . mattaṁ mūḍa koḷakeya bayaloḷage naḍava vōṇi
gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu yegñabhaṭara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu puṭṭabhaṭara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu paṁḍi
mayya hōḷara gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yī nālku gaḍiyoḷage bittumu 1 ha 5 mataṁ pāUseṭiya kaṭṭiṁda ba
ḍaga gaḍiyiṁ saḍuvalu guḍehōḷara gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu karttara gaḍi voḍeyapahōḷa ragaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu janārdda
na hōḷara gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yi nālku gaḍiyoḷage bittu hā 35 lu kācana bāḷu sahavā
gi bittu mu kke hadi gadde yanu biḍāruvāgi biṭṭu tirumaseṭiya kayalu tegadukoṁḍa varaha
ga 700 mūlādige ga 49 Aṁtu Aruvāra mūlādhi saha sāhāya bāḷanu U
bāḷuvaru yī bāḷa mēle maṭhakke pradānāyavāgi naḍava Akki mu 29 .
Digital edition of SII 7.333 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
